title: ranunculus canaster
intro: Ranunculus canaster, also known as buttercup, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the Ranunculaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ranunculus canaster include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce swelling, and act as a natural antiseptic to prevent infection. Ranunculus canaster can be prepared in herbal form through infusions or decoctions, and can also be used topically as a poultice or salve to aid in wound healing.
